hooks.name: Check for Hardcoded Secrets
hooks.description: Prevent committing hardcoded secrets, API keys, passwords, or connection strings

hooks.name: Check for Database ID Exposure
hooks.description: Ensure Public IDs are used instead of database IDs in API code

hooks.name: Check for console.log
hooks.description: Warn about console.log statements in production code

hooks.name: Enforce DTO Usage
hooks.description: Ensure controllers use DTOs instead of entity models

hooks.name: Check Test Coverage
hooks.description: Remind to write tests for new code

hooks.prompt: ⚠️ Remember: Wizardworks requires 80%+ test coverage. Have you written tests for this code?

✅ Great! Following TDD by writing tests first. Remember:
1. RED: Test should fail
2. GREEN: Write minimal implementation
3. REFACTOR: Improve code quality

hooks.name: Infrastructure as Code Check
hooks.description: Remind to use Bicep for Azure resources

hooks.prompt: 🏗️ Wizardworks Standard: All Azure resources must be defined in Bicep (infrastructure/). Never create resources manually in the portal.

hooks.name: Security Review Reminder
hooks.description: Remind about security review for sensitive operations

hooks.prompt:
🔒 Security Check Required:
- No hardcoded secrets
- Input validation implemented
- Authentication/authorization verified
- Use Azure Key Vault for secrets

Run /code-review when done!

hooks.name: Async/Await Check
hooks.description: Ensure async methods use await properly in C#

hooks.name: Immutability Check
hooks.description: Check for state mutation in TypeScript/React code

hooks.name: TanStack Query Check
hooks.description: Ensure TanStack Query is used for data fetching in React

hooks.name: Docker Configuration Check
hooks.description: Remind to update Docker configuration when dependencies change

hooks.prompt:
📦 Dependency Change Detected:
If you've added new packages, remember to:
1. Update Dockerfile if needed
2. Update docker-compose.yml
3. Rebuild containers: docker-compose build

hooks.name: Code Review Reminder
hooks.description: Suggest code review after significant changes

hooks.prompt:
📝 After completing your implementation, run /code-review to verify:
- Wizardworks standards compliance
- Security best practices
- Code quality
- Architecture patterns
